Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Ah yes, today's shaping up to be a glorious day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}It's such a shame that the third-years and the ladies won't be joining us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Um, if we're splitting watermelons, I'm out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Wha— Just like that!? You're not even gonna hear me out!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}You have a watermelon and a bat. What else could it possibly be?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's more for little kids anyway, plus it's really hot out. And look, I get you're trying to be nice...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Yeah, for real! Without you, it'd just be me and {f 4 2}, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}And isn't that just the saddest thing you ever heard?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Well, when you put it that way... I guess I don't have a choice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Hey, don't make it sound like we have nothing better to do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Eh, but I guess we really don't, huh? C'mon, let's have some fun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Well, when you put it that way... Maybe just for a little bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I know, Koromaru. Don't you worry, boy. We didn't forget about ya![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Alright, what're we waitin' for? The youngest gets to draw first blood![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Now this is what real summer feels like! My blood's pumpin' somethin' fierce![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Look who's acting like a kid now... Heheh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Oh yeah, where's the blindfold? We can't split watermelons with just a bat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 4 25 25}Speaking of... This bat seems kind of worn in, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Oh wow, you caught that. That bat and I go way back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Had it since I was in little league. I've never mentioned this before?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Ah, musta never had a chance to talk about it. That I used to play baseball, I mean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Oh yeah? Well, it's not some big secret or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I used to play tons of baseball back in the day. But that's old news now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Wait, then should we really be hitting watermelons with this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Nah, it's cool. Don't think I'll be usin' it much from here on out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}What's wrong, bud? Dyin' to chomp on some melon?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru's trying to tell us something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Hey, c'mon, Koromaru. We can't swing at the watermelon with you in the way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Hey, why don't we use something other than the bat?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Then what else are we gonna use?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 5 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Um, anything, I guess! Just as long as it's interesting![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 5 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Interesting? Kind of a weird request... Oh, like if Sanada-san used his bare hands?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Well, when I got back, I thought I heard voices coming from the roof, so I came to check it out. Watermelon splittin', huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Th-That's right! We were just talking about what to use to hit it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}You're not gonna use that bat?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_037_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We want you to use your fists.

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Yeah! We were just saying you could probably do it with your bare hands![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}That is tempting, considering how huge it is. Are you sure it's okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Oh my god, yes! I'd actually love to see that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Huh? Uh, sure, if that's what you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}All right. Guess I better make this good, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}Hey, try not to go all out or there won't be any left to eat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Whooooa! Sanada-san, you're incredible![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}What the heck! How are we supposed to eat it now!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}Can't believe that thing was still edible after it exploded like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 6 25 25}Didn't go exactly how I was expectin', but it looked like Amada had fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Ahhh, and man, I was actin' kinda lame back there, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}Y'know, before we busted the melon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}I'm talkin' about the whole bat thing. You were just tryin' to be thoughtful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}I didn't wanna come off like I was havin' second thoughts, but I guess I couldn't help it, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 5 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}I was supposed to be this cool mentor, but instead the kid ends up pitying me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}Haha, don't worry about me anymore. I'll just get even sadder, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}I mean, I'm not sayin' it's your fault, {f 4 2}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}Ah, how the hell do I put it...? This is a me problem. It probably doesn't make sense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}I feel like my life, my teenage years...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}Anyway, I think we're done for today, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}Appreciate you helpin' me prep and clean up. Welp, let's head back downstairs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has improved[n]after seeing how considerate Junpei is...[n]{f 1 1}
